EnterpriseSDK
Table of Contents

Interface IMSegmentation4

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geometry
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geometry.dll

Provides access to additional linear referencing operations on polylines.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("0AA29B2F-A1AD-448C-9B13-2AA06D14C022")]
public interface IMSegmentation4 : IMSegmentation3, IMSegmentation2, IMSegmentation, IMCollection

extrapolationStyle esriExtrapolationEnum
fromPart int
FromPoint int
toPart int
ToPoint int

ExtrapolateMs3D(esriExtrapolationEnum, int, int, int, int)

Extrapolates the Ms at one or both ends of the geometry based on the M interval between the fromIndex and the toIndex.

void ExtrapolateMs3D(esriExtrapolationEnum extrapolationStyle, int fromPart, int FromPoint, int toPart, int ToPoint)

Parameters

extrapolationStyle esriExtrapolationEnum
fromPart int
FromPoint int
toPart int
ToPoint int

Examples

Sample Snippet

GetDistancesAtM(bool, double) 

object GetDistancesAtM(bool asRatio, double M)

Parameters

asRatio bool
M double

Returns

object

GetDistancesAtM3D(bool, double)

Returns an array of 3D distances along the polyline at which is located the specified M. If the geometry's M's are monotonic along the geometry then the array will only have one element.

object GetDistancesAtM3D(bool asRatio, double M)

Parameters

asRatio bool
M double

Returns

object

Examples

Sample Snippet

GetMsAtDistance(double, bool) 

object GetMsAtDistance(double distance, bool asRatio)

Parameters

distance double
asRatio bool

Returns

object

GetMsAtDistance3D(double, bool)

Returns M values at the 3D distance along the geometry. An array of one or two Ms is returned. Two Ms can be returned if the given distance is exactly at the beginning or ending of a part.

object GetMsAtDistance3D(double distance, bool asRatio)

Parameters

distance double
asRatio bool

Returns

object

fromM double
toM double

IGeometryCollection

GetSubcurveBetweenMs3D(double, double)

Returns a polyline geometry corresponding to the subcurve(s) between the fromM and the toM.

IGeometryCollection GetSubcurveBetweenMs3D(double fromM, double toM)

Parameters

fromM double
toM double

Returns

IGeometryCollection

Examples

Sample Snippet

GetSubcurveBetweenMsEx(double, double, ref int, ref int) 

IGeometryCollection GetSubcurveBetweenMsEx(double fromM, double toM, ref int fromMDetails, ref int toMDetails)

Parameters

fromM double
toM double
fromMDetails int
toMDetails int

Returns

IGeometryCollection

GetSubcurveBetweenMsEx3D(double, double, ref int, ref int)

Returns a polyline geometry corresponding to the subcurve(s) between the fromM and the toM values. The 'details' arguments are composed of esriMCurveRelationEnum values.

IGeometryCollection GetSubcurveBetweenMsEx3D(double fromM, double toM, ref int fromMDetails, ref int toMDetails)

Parameters

fromM double
toM double
fromMDetails int
toMDetails int

Returns

IGeometryCollection

InsertMAtDistance(double, double, bool, bool, out bool, out int, out int) 

void InsertMAtDistance(double M, double distance, bool asRatio, bool createPart, out bool SplitHappened, out int newPartIndex, out int newSegmentIndex)

Parameters

M double
distance double
asRatio bool
createPart bool
SplitHappened bool
newPartIndex int
newSegmentIndex int

InsertMAtDistance3D(double, double, bool, bool, out bool, out int, out int)

Sets the M value at the given 3D distance along the geometry; creates a point at that distance if no point exists there.

void InsertMAtDistance3D(double M, double distance, bool asRatio, bool createPart, out bool SplitHappened, out int newPartIndex, out int newSegmentIndex)

Parameters

M double
distance double
asRatio bool
createPart bool
SplitHappened bool
newPartIndex int
newSegmentIndex int

fromPart int
FromPoint int
toPart int

InterpolateMsBetween3D(int, int, int, int)

Generates Ms by linear interpolation of 3D distances for all vertices in the range [start+1, end-1].

void InterpolateMsBetween3D(int fromPart, int FromPoint, int toPart, int ToPoint)

Parameters

fromPart int
FromPoint int
toPart int
ToPoint int

SetAndInterpolateMsBetween(double, double) 

void SetAndInterpolateMsBetween(double fromM, double toM)

Parameters

fromM double
toM double

SetAndInterpolateMsBetween3D(double, double)

Sets the Ms at the beginning and the end of the geometry and interpolates the M values between these values based on an interpolation normalized to the 3D length of the shape.

void SetAndInterpolateMsBetween3D(double fromM, double toM)

Parameters

fromM double
toM double
